insight: voice-IN ≠ voice-OUT — only the :4441 audio-OUT server was down; STT capture, SMS, and display kept working the whole time, which is how qi stayed in sync while audio was silent.

voice_path.note: RECOVERED — was down (curl /health=000, 5 hard fails, launchd kickstart did NOT recover). Root cause: Node 25 undici setTypeOfService EINVAL uncaught crash-loop. Fix: pinned launchd plist to node@20. Verified 200 ×3. LANDMINE: a homebrew node upgrade re-points /opt/homebrew/bin/node to 25 and reintroduces the crash.
never went down — kept qi in sync during audio outage
